# Bulk upload of Turtle data
endpoint: upload
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: POST /upload with Turtle returns 2xx

=== request
POST /upload
Content-Type: text/turtle

<http://example.org/u1> <http://example.org/p> "v" .
<http://example.org/u2> <http://example.org/p> "v" .

=== response
200
